dashboard +
asset upload (presigned PUT,
signed for app domain)

→ 307 to presigned GET)

span.p:
Traefik — :80/:443, TLS via Let's Encrypt
FRESCO_DOMAIN → fresco :3000
FRESCO_DOMAIN/assets/* → minio :9000

MinIO — private
bucket 'assets',
no published ports,
no anonymous access
